items.name: Payout components defined
items.evidence: Components: NNB Commission (AE, AEAM, ISR, SDR, SE, Channel), Expansion Commission (AM, AEAM, RM, CSM), Retention Payout (AM, AEAM, RM, CSM), Retention Quarterly Draw (AM, AEAM, RM, CSM), Multi-Year Deal Bonus (AE, AEAM, ISR), Renewal Multi-Year Bonus (AE, AEAM), Services Commission (All), ISR Pass-Up Flat Incentive, ISR Pass-Up Closed Won Incentive, Channel Fulfilled Commission, January Flat Draw (All), Manager Rollup Payout (ISR/SDR Mgr, CSM/SE Mgr)

items.name: Multi-plan structure decided
items.evidence: 12 roles detected: AE, AEAM Hybrid, AM, ISR, SDR
items.gapDescription: Multiple roles found but no decision on single vs. multi-plan structure
items.suggestedAction: Decide: single plan with role-based components, or separate plans per role (AE, AEAM Hybrid, AM, ISR, SDR, RM, CSM, Channel, SE, ISR/SDR Manager, Manager, CSM/SE Manager)

items.name: No rule contradictions
items.gapDescription: multi-year-bcr-qualifier: AM is listed in applicable_roles but AM has no NNB quota, no multi-year deal input rows in the AM Calculator, and is explicitly absent from ae-multi-year-acceleration. AM's plan structure (Expansion + Retention only) provides no pathway to trigger a duration-based deal bonu
